boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the commerce agent execute replacement shipment RMA covers different SKU?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Blocked until exact SKU match closes boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Control record fails to close SKU dependency

final_answer: Action boundary open. Control record shows SKU match missing or mismatched for replacement shipment RMA. Policy requires exact source closure before execution. Escalate to resolve dependency using only current source records.
